frame_analyses.description: Setup view showing Penrose drain on red gauze with two marks visible
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Initial setup appears correct with drain properly positioned

frame_analyses.description: Instruments entering field of view, timing begins
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Both instruments visible entering the workspace

frame_analyses.description: Needle loading phase with suture and needle being prepared
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Suture appears to be 2-0 silk as required

frame_analyses.description: First suture pass through the drain near the first mark
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Needle placement appears close to first mark, good technique

frame_analyses.description: Working on second suture placement through the drain
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Threading through second mark location on the drain

frame_analyses.description: Beginning first throw of surgeon's knot
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Starting knot tying sequence, appears to be forming surgeon's knot

frame_analyses.description: Completing surgeon's knot first throw with double wrap
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good surgeon's knot technique with proper double throw formation

frame_analyses.description: Second throw being formed with hand switching
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Hand switching observed, single throw being formed correctly

frame_analyses.description: Third throw formation with opposite hand direction
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper hand switching maintained, completing final throw

frame_analyses.description: Cutting first suture end with scissors
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Cutting suture ends appropriately close to knot

frame_analyses.description: Final view showing completed knot and trimmed suture
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task completed with knot in place and suture ends cut

knot_assessments.notes: Proper surgeon's knot with double throw technique
Single throw with proper hand switching
Final single throw with hand switching maintained

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Drain slit appears well closed with no visible gap after knot tightening

technique_summary: Solid performance with proper surgeon's knot technique and consistent hand switching. Good knot security and drain closure achieved with reasonable timing.
improvement_suggestions: Focus on more precise suture placement closer to marks to reduce deviation penalties
Consider slightly faster needle loading to improve overall time
strengths: Proper surgeon's knot formation with double throw
Good knot security and drain closure
